items.name: Lakeside Mini Banquet
items.description:
Minimum 2 pax. Served with naan, salad, papad, rice.

CHOOSE ANY 1 NON-VEG ENTRÉE:
  Chicken Lollipop | Chicken 65 | Shami Kebab | Barra Kebab

CHOOSE ANY 1 VEG ENTRÉE:
  Dahi Puri | Avo Chaat | Aloo Tikki Chat | Tandoori Gobi

CHOOSE ANY 2 CURRIES:
  Chana Masala | Soya Chaap Masala | Mutton Rara | Chicken Kadai

items.name: Chef's Special Vegetarian Banquet
items.description:
Minimum 2 pax. Served with naan/roti, salad, papad, rice, and dessert.

CHOOSE ANY 3 VEGETARIAN ENTRÉES:
  Banaras Tikki | Soya Malai Chaap | Achari Paneer | Stuffed Mushroom

CHOOSE ANY 3 VEGETARIAN MAINS:
  Mutter Mushroom Curry | Baingan Patiala | Steamed Bhindi | Green Curry Kofta

items.name: Lakeside Special Banquet
items.description:
Minimum 4 pax. Served with naan, salad, achar, papad, rice, and raita.

CHOOSE ANY 2 NON-VEG ENTRÉES:
  Chicken/Lamb Sekuwa | Chicken Malai Tikka | Chicken 65 | Fish Tikka

CHOOSE ANY 2 VEG ENTRÉES:
  Soya Charcoal Tikka | Mix Pakoda | Avo Chaat | Achari Paneer Tikka

CHOOSE ANY 2 NON-VEG MAINS:
  Butter Chicken | Chicken Tikka Masala | Chicken Curry/Goat | Fish Curry

CHOOSE ANY 2 VEG MAINS:
  Paneer Kali Mirch | Palak Paneer | Dal Tadka/Makhani | Veg Jai Puri

items.name: Nepali Banquet
items.description:
Minimum 2 pax. A traditional Nepali meal experience including Dal, Curry, Vegetables, Achar, Gundruk, Rice, Naan/Roti, and Dessert.

ENTRÉES:
  Gurkha Aloo | Chicken Chilli | Taas (Mutton)

MAINS:
  Chicken/Goat Curry | Thakali Daal | Veg Curry/Chana Masala

Note: No add-on for entrée or mains; $5 extra for add-on.

items.name: Mo:Mo — Chowmein Combo
items.description:
Minimum 2 pax. Comes with soft drink / mocktail. Per person: 5 pieces each.

STEAM MO:MO (5 PCS): Veg | Chicken | Buffalo

FRIED MO:MO (5 PCS): Veg | Chicken | Buffalo

CHOOSE ANY 1: Chowmein | Fried Rice

CHOOSE ANY 1: Chicken Chilli | Paneer Chilli
